inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Entity ID or Name
inputs.description: Entity ID (ws_…) or exact name to retrieve.

inputs.name: database
inputs.label: Database
inputs.description: Wired database name — overrides the Database property. Connect a Global Database node here.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Entity (JSON)
outputs.description: Full entity JSON including all sections.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error if the entity was not found.
